steps.title: Identify the explicit goal
steps.content: The student must specify the number of gray wolves in Yellowstone—this requires stating an actual population figure from the notes.

steps.title: Match the choice that states the number
steps.content: Choice D directly states “roughly 100 gray wolves living in it” from the notes. The other three omit the number, instead offering reintroduction timing, wolves' existence at a certain time, and the definition of carrying capacity. That matches choice D — D is correct.
